# Bitcoin Plunges Below $60,000 Amid Selloff

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 30, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Bitcoin tumbled as much as 3.5% toward $58,000 on Tuesday as investors reversed an initial vote of confidence in Michael Saylor’s financing overhaul at Strategy Inc., raising fresh concerns that one of the cryptocurrency’s biggest buyers may no longer be a consistent source of demand.

## ⚡ Why This Matters (The Macro View)
